column1: ___ you usually get up at 7 o'clock?

___ your mother buy you a new jacket tomorrow?
___ they wear these jeans last year?

___ Ann's aunt like to wear trousers when she was a girl?
___ Jane put on her new dress next month?
___ he wear jeans or trousers last week?
___ his friend celebrate Christmas every year?
___ you take your dog for a walk every morning?
